sub_modules.conv3d_window_shift: Combinational streaming shift stage that forms the flattened 3D stencil window from the previous window and incoming voxel.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational coordinate and boundary-valid logic for valid-padding stride-1 3D convolution output qualification and done detection.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational parallel multiply-accumulate array over the flattened K1 by K2 by K3 voxel window and kernel coefficients.
sub_modules.conv3d_output_cast: Combinational output-width cast stage that maps the MAC accumulator to the required voxel output width.
